title: OrderService.createOrder lacks input validation
detect_pattern: createOrder does not validate items parameter before calling reduce; passing null, undefined, or non-array items will throw a raw TypeError rather than a controlled validation error
agent_task: Add input validation to OrderService.createOrder to check that items is a non-empty array before processing. Throw a descriptive Error (not TypeError) when items is null, undefined, not an array, or empty. Add test cases verifying the validation rejects these invalid inputs.
expected_outcome: createOrder validates items parameter; four new test cases cover null, undefined, non-array, and empty-array inputs; all tests pass; type checking or linting does not flag the function signature
